name: Greek Lemon–olive Oil Dressing

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper (optional)
The basic ratio is 1:3—that is, one part fresh lemon juice to three parts olive oil.
Put the lemon juice in a bowl and, while whisking vigorously, drizzle in the oil.
Add a pinch each of salt and pepper, if you like, and
, the most basic Greek sauce and dressing.

method: The basic ratio is 1:3—that is, one part fresh lemon juice to three parts olive oil.
Put the lemon juice in a bowl and, while whisking vigorously, drizzle in the oil.
Add a pinch each of salt and pepper, if you like, and oriste—that’s “voilà” in Greece—you have ladolemono, the most basic Greek sauce and dressing.
